title: angorkis megalorrhiza
side_effects: Angorkis megalorrhiza can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and nausea, due to its high saponin content. Overconsumption can also lead to dizziness, headaches, and fatigue. In severe cases, improper use of Angorkis megalorrhiza may trigger allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and swelling. Additionally, the plant's interactions with certain medications can exacerbate conditions like high blood pressure and kidney problems.
